pi_items.source: Evidence from route_planning_settings.png screenshot showing actual Sygic UI, cross-referenced with official Sygic manual at https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/route-amp-navigation which lists 'Avoid Highways' as the exact setting name

pi_items.verified_value: UI label is 'Avoid highways' (not 'Avoid motorways'); keywords motorway/highway/freeway are semantically related to highways concept but do not match the actual UI label which specifies 'highways' not 'motorways'
pi_items.source: Route planning UI displays exactly 'Avoid highways'. Official Sygic documentation distinguishes motorways as a subset of highways/controlled-access roads

pi_items.verified_value: Can be toggled true/false; task description indicates should be toggled ON
pi_items.source: Task description states 'Enable Avoid Motorways (or Highways)' and screenshot confirms this setting exists and can be toggled

Route planning settings screenshot (evidence_docs/route_planning_settings.png) shows exact UI label 'Avoid unpaved roads', confirmed by official Sygic manual https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/route-amp-navigation
Setting name is 'Avoid unpaved roads'; keywords 'unpaved', 'gravel', 'dirt' are all semantically accurate synonyms/related concepts for the type of roads being avoided

pi_items.verified_value: Can be toggled true/false; task requires toggling ON
pi_items.source: Task description states 'Enable Avoid Unpaved roads', screenshot confirms setting is toggleable
Setup script hardcodes PACKAGE='com.sygic.aura', real 154MB APK file present at examples/sygic_gps_env/scripts/apks/com.sygic.aura.apk

pi_items.verified_value: Real app with real settings UI
pi_items.source: UI screenshots match real Sygic GPS Navigation app interface documented at https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/route-amp-navigation. Settings available: Avoid Highways, Avoid Toll Roads, Avoid Ferries, Avoid Unpaved Roads, Avoid Congestion Charge Zones exactly match documented Sygic features

privileged_info_summary: The configure_scooter_routing task uses the real Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura). The task requires enabling two routing settings. The setting for 'Avoid Unpaved Roads' is correctly named and documented in the metadata. However, the metadata incorrectly names the first setting as 'Avoid Motorways' when the actual UI label in Sygic is 'Avoid Highways'. These are distinct concepts: 'Avoid Highways' is the broader Sygic setting that applies to all high-speed roads, while 'Avoid Motorways' is a more specific term not used in the actual UI. The task description itself acknowledges both terms ('Enable Avoid Motorways (or Highways)'), but the metadata definition uses only the incorrect primary name. Keywords for both settings are semantically reasonable synonyms for the road types being avoided.
